value.description: Controlled value of the combined code.

onComplete.description: Called when all fields are filled.

type.description: Allowed character set. 'password' also masks input.

mask.description: Mask characters as dots/asterisks even if type isn't password.

variant.description: Visual style. 'box' is a bordered tile, 'underline' uses a bottom border only, 'soft' uses a filled background.

autoFocus.description: Auto-focus the first field on mount.

groupAfter.description: Insert a visual separator after every N fields (e.g., 3 for 3-3 grouping).

invalid.description: Show error styling on the fields.

name.description: Name prefix used for each <input> (rendered as `${name}-${index}`).

className.description: Additional CSS class for the root.
